## Issue to Resolve

No spacing around colon in annotation
Spacing should not be allowed around the colon in annotation and annotation entries regardless of the annotation target

```
@file:JvmName("Foo") // allowed
@file :JvmName("Foo") // disallowed
@file: JvmName("Foo") // disallowed
@file : JvmName("Foo") // disallowed

@set:[Inject VisibleForTesting] // allowed
@set :[Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
@set: [Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
@set : [Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
```

- `CHANGELOG.md`

Now I understand the issue. Looking at lines 39-42 of the `SpacingAroundColonRule.kt`, I can see that when a colon is part of an `ANNOTATION` or `ANNOTATION_ENTRY`, the code just returns without doing any spacing checks. The TODO comment explicitly references issue #2093 about enforcing no spacing.

Let me look at the test files to understand the testing patterns:

Now I understand the issue. Looking at the code:

1. Lines 39-42 in `SpacingAroundColonRule.kt` show that when a colon is part of an `ANNOTATION` or `ANNOTATION_ENTRY`, the code just returns without checking spacing.
2. The TODO comment on line 40 references issue #2093 about enforcing no spacing.
3. The issue requires that NO spacing should be allowed around the colon in annotations (e.g., `@file:JvmName("Foo")` is allowed, but `@file :JvmName("Foo")` should be disallowed).
